creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Philip Paeps from comment #7)

There are problems going on trying to actually build some
of the stable/13 snapshot images, the ones for embedded
Small Board Computers. So: not just mirroring issues
currently.

But the original problem was dealt with and multiple other
problems have occurred and been fixed since then, as I
understand. There have been times since submittal when all
the images were present.

Keeping this active for a indefinite series of distinct
problems would seem odd. Closed FIXED for the original
problem seems reasonable to me.
